title: Kanban Plan — Fusion Simplification Batch (FUS-01..FUS-06)

planning_session.author: pi-agent
planning_session.goal: Implement approved behavior-preserving simplifications from fusion plan with strict TODO/DOING/DONE discipline per task.

peer_review_note.summary: Approve. Conservative extract-method simplifications, zero behavior change, clearer orchestration flow, cleaner tests, and passing verification.

DONE.task: ct-format: centralize main() exit-flow via run(args)->int
DONE.notes: Peer approved: behavior-preserving extract-method style; keep exit mappings/messages exact.
acceptance_criteria: Exit mapping exact: 0 success, 2 template ValueError, 4 processing ValueError, 1 unexpected
stderr prefixes unchanged: Error:, Validation error:, Unexpected error:
DONE.status_note: Implemented run(args)->int + single exit in main(); pytest tests/test_ct_format.py -v passed (12/12).

DONE.task: ct-fetch: extract contract-validation block from main()
DONE.notes: Peer approved: low-risk helper extraction; preserve Contract violation path and code 4.
acceptance_criteria: Contract validation failure prints 'Contract violation: ...' to stderr and exits 4
Outer error mapping unchanged: ValueError=2, ConnectionError=3, generic=1
DONE.status_note: Extracted enforce_output_or_exit helper; preserved Contract violation stderr + exit 4. pytest tests/test_ct_fetch.py -v passed (10 selected).

DONE.task: ct-schedule: extract showtime resolution logic from enrich_movies() loop
DONE.notes: Peer approved: readability gain; preserve dry_run/url/adapter precedence and warning behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Branch precedence unchanged: dry_run > missing url > adapter call
ConnectionError still downgrades to [] and warns only in verbose mode
DONE.status_note: Extracted resolve_showtimes_for_movie helper; preserved branch precedence and warning behavior. pytest tests/test_ct_schedule.py -v passed (7/7).

DONE.task: ct-fetch adapter: replace list-scan duplicate check with seen_titles set
DONE.notes: Peer approved: explicit dedup intent, preserve first-seen title retention and order.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate policy remains exact title-string match
DONE.status_note: Switched duplicate guard to seen_titles set (order-preserving). pytest tests/test_ct_fetch.py -v passed (10 selected).

DONE.task: ct-schedule adapter: simplify unique time extraction in parse_showtimes_html()
DONE.notes: Peer approved: order-preserving dedup simplification, regex/output shape unchanged.
DONE.status_note: Simplified time dedup with order-preserving dict.fromkeys pipeline. pytest tests/test_ct_schedule.py -v passed (7/7).

DONE.task: ct-cognize: linearize parse_response JSON strategy pipeline
DONE.notes: Peer approved with caution: preserve strategy order and return semantics exactly.
acceptance_criteria: Order unchanged: direct parse -> extracted array -> markdown block -> ValueError
Direct non-list still wraps to list; fallback semantics unchanged
DONE.status_note: Consolidated parse_response via _try_json_load helper with unchanged strategy order/semantics. pytest tests/test_ct_cognize.py -v passed (28/28).

acceptance_criteria: All six fusion simplification tasks completed with TODO/DOING/DONE transitions
Batch A and Batch B gates pass
